API_AUTH_URL = "https://api.production.internal/v2/data-service/authenticate"


def connect_to_api():
    return requests.get(API_AUTH_URL)


def fetch_records():
    response = requests.get(API_AUTH_URL)
    return response.json()


def send_report():
    requests.post(API_AUTH_URL, json={"report": "data"})


def validate_token():
    return check_token(API_AUTH_URL)
